subcodes.first_line: The Name of Júd mentioned you in the Most Holy Court; wherefore doth the Supreme Pen make mention of thee from the Most Glorious Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسم جود ذکر شما را در ساحت اقدس معروض داشت لذا قلم اعلی از افق ابهی ترا ذکر مینماید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
